## Problem

What workflow or limitation should this improve?

## Proposal

What should explorie do?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

- Area: UI / file operations / previews / plugins / CLI / release / docs

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, related tools, or links that clarify the request.
